title: Inbox handler (Follow, Undo Follow, discard)
description: POST /users/{username}/inbox and POST /inbox (shared inbox). Verify HTTP signature on every request. For Follow: insert followers row (actor_uri, inbox_uri, shared_inbox_uri from actor doc fetch), send Accept{Follow} back to follower's inbox. For Undo{Follow}: delete followers row. For everything else: return 202 Accepted, do nothing. Reject unsigned or invalid-signature requests with 401.
close_reason: Delivery worker with retry/backoff/circuit-breaker, fan-out, queue CLI, inbox Follow/Accept/Undo all implemented
